message:
feat: Add DWARF .debug_line section generation for debugger support

- Create dwarf_emitter.zig with DWARF 5 line number program emitter
- Support standard opcodes: advance_pc, advance_line, set_file, copy
- Support extended opcodes: set_address, end_sequence
- Generate ULEB128/SLEB128 encoded values
- Integrate with --debug flag to produce .debug_line files
- Re-export dwarf module through debug_info for convenience

This enables debuggers (LLDB/GDB) to map addresses to Python line
numbers in compiled metal0 binaries.
